{"id":"project-LICHEN-ylmg","title":"SchcChannel._on_inner swallows all exceptions silently","description":"File: python/src/lichen/coap/schc_channel.py:98-105

The receive handler catches all exceptions and only logs at DEBUG:
```python
def _on_inner(self, data: bytes, source: str) -> None:
    try:
        coap = unwrap_coap(decompress_packet(data))
    except Exception as exc:
        logger.debug('SchcChannel: failed to decompress/unwrap packet: %s', exc)
        return
```

While robustness is good, logging at DEBUG means:
1. Production deployments won't see decompression failures
2. Attack attempts (malformed packets) go unnoticed
3. Bugs in decompress_packet/unwrap_coap are hidden

Similar issue in node_channel.py:81-82.

Fix: Log at WARNING for unexpected exceptions, or at least track metrics/counters for dropped packets.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:46.537279Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:46.537314Z"}

The receive handler catches all exceptions and only logs at DEBUG:

    try:
        coap = unwrap_coap(decompress_packet(data))
    except Exception as exc:

        return
```

While robustness is good, logging at DEBUG means:
1. Production deployments won't see decompression failures
2. Attack attempts (malformed packets) go unnoticed

Similar issue in node_channel.py:81-82.
